question: 查询ID为3的作者所著的前10篇论文，这些论文的摘要，之后在另一数据库他们的标题和提交的会议ID又是什么

query_1.description: 查询ID为3的作者所著的前10篇论文的ID。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (a:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(p:Paper)
WHERE a.ID = 3
RETURN p.ID AS paper_id

query_2.description: 查询步骤1中获取的论文ID列表对应的摘要
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT ID as abstract_id, has_text as abstract_text FROM Abstract
WHERE has_text IS NOT NULL AND is_the_1th_part_of IN (600, 0)
results: tibetans slavishly hipless prs bluejays cuppier nonsurgical tibetans slavishly hipless prs bluejays cuppier nonsurgical tibetans slavishly hipless prs bluejays cuppier nonsurgical

bluejays cuppier nonsurgical skimpiest outpoured dissociated heartier petitionee brill bluejays cuppier nonsurgical skimpiest outpoured dissociated heartier petitionee brill bluejays cuppier nonsurgical skimpiest outpoured dissociated heartier petitionee brill

query_3.description: 查询步骤1中获取的论文ID列表对应的标题和提交的会议ID。
results: bluejays cuppier nonsurgical skimpiest outpoured dissociated heartier petitionee brill
tibetans slavishly hipless prs bluejays cuppier nonsurgical

question: 查询ID为1000的委员会的成员 ID，获取对应的邮箱地址，这些成员的名字、姓氏又是什么呢？

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查询ID为1000的委员会的成员ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:MEMBER_OF]->(c:Committee)
WHERE c.ID = 1000
RETURN p.ID AS person_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j查询得到的成员ID列表，在MySQL中查询这些成员的电子邮件地址。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT h.Person AS person_id, h.VALUE AS email
FROM has_an_email h
WHERE h.Person IN (1800, 1396, 998, 800, 56)

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j查询得到的成员ID列表，在PostgreSQL中查询这些成员的名字和姓氏。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
  p."ID" AS person_id,
  p."has_the_first_name",
  p."has_the_last_name"
FROM "Person" p
WHERE p."ID" IN (1800, 1396, 998, 800, 56)

question: 查找ID为3的作者所著的所有论文,查询这些论文的审稿意见,查询每篇论文的作者数量

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找ID为3的作者（Person）所著的所有论文（Paper），返回这些论文的ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE p.ID = 3
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的审稿意见。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments
FROM Review r
WHERE r.reviews IN (0, 600)
results:
In their paper 'ZSWC-2014' the authors discuss ZSWC-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2014 in particular

The paper "ZSWC-2014" is mainly about ZSWC-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2014 in particular

In their paper 'SIGXYZ-2014' the authors discuss SIGXYZ-2014.
Though apparently a contribution of remarkable novelty, 'SIGXYZ-2014' also has its weaknesses.

The paper "SIGXYZ-2014" is mainly about SIGXYZ-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight SIGXYZ-2014 in particular

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL的Paper表和contributes表中查询每篇论文的作者数量。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
    p."ID" AS paper_id,
    COUNT(c."Person") AS author_count
FROM "Paper" p
LEFT JOIN contributes c ON p."ID" = c."Conference_document"
WHERE p."ID" IN (0, 600)
GROUP BY p."ID"

question: 查询ID=1000委员会的成员,查询这些成员的电子邮件地址,然后查询这些成员名字、姓氏

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查询ID=1000的委员会的成员ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:MEMBER_OF]->(c:Committee)
WHERE c.ID = 1000
RETURN p.ID AS person_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j查询得到的成员ID列表，在MySQL中查询这些成员的电子邮件地址。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT h.Person AS person_id, h.VALUE AS email
FROM has_an_email h
WHERE h.Person IN (1800, 1396, 998, 800, 56)

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j查询得到的成员ID列表，在PostgreSQL中查询这些成员的名字和姓氏。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
  p."ID" AS person_id,
  p."has_the_first_name",
  p."has_the_last_name"
FROM "Person" p
WHERE p."ID" IN (1800, 1396, 998, 800, 56)

question: 查找会议ID=7的投稿论文限制10条,这些论文的所有审稿意见是是什么,每篇论文的标题和对应的会议是什么

query_1.description: 在Neo4j图数据库中查找会议ID=7的所有投稿论文，限制15条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (paper:Paper)-[:SUBMITTED_AT]->(conf:Conference)
WHERE conf.ID = 7
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 15

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的所有审稿意见。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments
FROM Review r
WHERE r.reviews IN (1828, 1236, 302, 1195, 322, 1124, 1025, 288, 541, 53, 63, 505, 1635, 1689, 423)

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL中查询每篇论文的详细信息和对应的会议信息。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
    p."ID" AS paper_id,
    p."has_a_paper_title",
    cv."has_a_name" AS conference_name,
    cv."has_a_location"
FROM "Paper" p
JOIN "Conference_volume" cv ON p."is_submitted_at" = cv."ID"
WHERE p."ID" IN (1828, 1236, 302, 1195, 322, 1124, 1025, 288, 541, 53, 63, 505, 1635, 1689, 423)

question: 查找所有提交到会议ID=7的前5篇论文，投稿论文摘要是什么，每篇论文的作者数量

query_1.description: 在Neo4j图数据库中查找所有提交到会议ID=7的论文，返回论文ID和标题，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (conf:Conference {ID: 7})<-[:SUBMITTED_AT]-(paper:Paper)
RETURN
  paper.ID AS paper_id,
  paper.title AS paper_title
LIMIT 10
results: kinkiest xix recollected householder overeducated objurgate
mongoloids danker raunchiness perspicuously disjoined nigglings midmonths
exorcises pirog desexes summable heliocentricity excretions recelebrating dually plateauing
bewigged playgoers cheques batting waspishly stilbestrol villainousness miscalling

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL中查询会议ID=7的前5篇投稿摘要。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT a.is_the_1th_part_of AS paper_id, a.has_text
FROM Abstract a
WHERE a.is_the_1th_part_of IN (1828, 1236, 302, 1195, 322)

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL中查询每篇论文的作者数量。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
    p."ID" AS paper_id,
    COUNT(c."Person") AS author_count
FROM "Paper" p
LEFT JOIN contributes c ON p."ID" = c."Conference_document"
WHERE p."ID" IN (1828, 1236, 302, 1195, 322)
GROUP BY p."ID"
